shortDescription: Modern 2-bedroom suite in Etobicoke with premium finishes and full building amenities.
fullDescription: Welcome to 225 Sherway Gardens Road, Unit 504 in the vibrant Etobicoke neighbourhood. This well-appointed condominium suite delivers effortless urban living with premium amenities. The main living area impresses with nine-foot ceilings, designer fixtures, and a seamless flow between rooms. The kitchen offers ample counter space, premium fixtures, and a convenient eat-in dining area. The sleeping quarters comprise 2 comfortable bedrooms, the largest enjoying a private ensuite bathroom. Building amenities include a fitness centre, rooftop terrace, party room, and 24-hour concierge. Transit, cycling infrastructure, and the best of Toronto’s cultural scene are right at your doorstep.
keyFeatures: Open kitchen with waterfall island and pot lights
Fenced yard ideal for children and pets
Close to waterfront trails and cycling paths
